title: Codiff Narrative Walkthrough
description: A story-shaped walkthrough of a diff (version 2). Separates order-independent segments (addressable slices of the live diff) from one or more reading orders over them. Diff content is never embedded — segments anchor into the diff Codiff computes from the repository.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON schema, for editor autocompletion.

agent.description: The agent backend that authored this walkthrough.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the walkthrough was generated.

title.description: Short title for the change, e.g. 'Hunk navigation skips collapsed files'.

focus.description: One to two sentence summary of the change.

meta.description: Optional display string, e.g. '6 stops · 4 chapters'.

source.description: The Codiff ReviewSource this walkthrough describes (working-tree, commit, branch, or pull-request).

context.description: The originating agent conversation (Codiff WalkthroughContext), embedded so Codiff can answer questions about the change.

commit.description: Marks the diff as a committable staging set. When present (and source is a working tree), Codiff adds a commit composer as the walkthrough's terminal stop.

subjectSeed.description: Seed for the human-authored subject line (line 1 of the message).

body.description: The agent-drafted commit body — a few paragraphs of prose describing the change as a whole. Shown editable by default.

segments.description: Order-independent atoms: each is an addressable slice of the live diff with its line counts.

granularity.description: How much of the file this segment covers.

changeType.description: Change-type tag shown on the file row in the commit composer.

commitNote.description: One-line note the generated commit body uses for this file (falls back to summary).

title.description: Default framing; an order's stop may override it.

summary.description: Short, plain-text gist of the slice.

sectionId.description: Matches a Codiff DiffSection id, e.g. 'src/App.tsx:staged'. Repaired if missing or stale.

startLine.description: Start line on `side`. Omit for 'file' granularity.

endLine.description: End line on `side` (inclusive). Omit for 'file' granularity.

comments.description: Review comments seeded by the walkthrough, anchored like live comments.

body.description: May be '' to seed an empty composer.

orders.description: One or more reading orders (views) over the same segments, e.g. key-changes-first and results-first.

tagline.description: e.g. 'Cause leads; the proof comes at the end.'

restLabel.description: Label for the off-path bundle, e.g. 'Not in the arc'.

sequence.description: Ordered stops. Each is a segment plus this order's framing of it.

phaseId.description: References a phase id in this order.

title.description: Overrides the segment's title for this order.

rest.description: Files changed alongside the work but kept off the narrative path.

reason.description: Why it is off the path, e.g. 'Generated', 'Lockfile', 'Snapshot', 'Mechanical'.

defaultOrder.description: The id of the order to open by default. Falls back to the first order if unknown.
